channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Passenger And Cruise
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location: USA, UK
Description:

A cruise line is seeking to fill all positions for its fleet. Both freshers and experienced candidates are welcome to apply. The role offers a salary range of 6000 to 16000 USD, with visa, ticket, and accommodation provided. Opportunities are available in the USA and UK.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] All Positions Hiring on Cruise Ship at Cruise Line Recruitment

item.description:
Location: UAE
Description:

Experienced professionals are sought for various positions aboard cruise ships. Opportunities include roles in hospitality, deck, engine, and catering departments. Candidates will gain international experience and enjoy competitive benefits while working in a globally recognized company known for exceptional service. This is a chance to develop professional skills and contribute to memorable travel experiences.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Multiple Vacancies on Cruise Ships at Silversea Cruises

item.description:
Location: Maldives, Cruise, Gulf, Mauritius, Malta and Seychelles
Description:

Vacancies are available for freshers and experienced professionals in hotels, resorts, and cruise ships. The salary ranges from 800 to 3500 USD, with visa, accommodation, and tickets provided. Positions are located in the Maldives, Cruise, Gulf, Mauritius, Malta, and Seychelles.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Hotel and Cruise Ship Jobs for Freshers Experienced at Hello Hoteliers Career Management PVT. LTD.

item.description:
Location: Maldives, Cruise, Gulf, Mauritius, Malta and Seychelles
Description:

Job openings are available for freshers and experienced professionals in the hotel and cruise industry. Positions include roles on cruise ships and in resorts. Salary ranges from 800 to 3500 USD, with visa, accommodation, and tickets provided. Locations include the Maldives, Gulf, Mauritius, Malta, and Seychelles.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Hotel Cruise Staff Jobs - Maldives, Gulf, Mauritius at Hello Hoteliers Career Management PVT. LTD.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Fresh career opportunities are available on cruise ships with Silversea Cruises. Further details regarding the application process can be found in the first comment.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Cruise Ship Careers at Silversea Cruises at Silversea Cruises

item.description:
Location: Hong Kong, Philippines
Description:

Multiple onboard positions are available on cruise ships, including roles in hotel operations, entertainment, technical services, healthcare, culinary, and guest experience. Openings span various departments such as culinary (Sous Chef, Chinese Chef, Sushi Chef), technical (Lights and Sound Technician, VR Arcade Technician), medical (Ship Doctor), and guest services (Waiter, Embarkation Staff). Opportunities are located in Hong Kong and the Philippines.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Cruise Ship Jobs - Hospitality Technical Roles at Dream Cruises

item.description:
Location: Dubai
Description:

Multiple job vacancies are available across all departments on a cruise ship. This is an opportunity to join a large fleet operating in Dubai. Interested candidates are encouraged to apply via the provided link for further details on specific roles and requirements.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Cruise Ship Job Vacancies - All Departments at Dream Cruises

item.description:
Location: Italy
Description:

A Steward position is available on RoRo Pax vessels for qualified personnel, with or without sea experience. Attractive salaries and contracts are offered for Italian-flagged vessels, including all benefits. Contact for more information.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Steward Job on RoRo Pax Vessel at Tinecomar Crewing Agency

item.description:
Location: Squamish, British Columbia
Description:

A Deckhand position is available on a passenger transfer vessel, requiring the SVMO-U qualification and previous experience on motor ships. Responsibilities include safe personnel transfer, emergency response, and maintaining vessel safety and environmental compliance. The role involves watchkeeping, maintenance, and record-keeping. This is a full-time, rotational contract position based in Squamish, British Columbia, with a daily rate range of $378.00 to $420.00.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Deckhand Job on Passenger Transfer Vessel at Bridgemans Services Group LP (BSG)

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Opportunities are available for crew members to join the Engine and Deck Departments on cruise ships. This role offers a chance to become part of a global team and travel the world. Candidates with relevant skills and a passion for a career at sea are encouraged to apply.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Crew Recruitment for MSC Cruises - Engine Deck at World of Seamen Group
